title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 44.415 - Emergency mutual aid compact
text:
44.415.  Emergency mutual aid compact. — 1.  This shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Mutual Aid Compact".
  2.  The emergency mutual aid compact is hereby enacted into law and entered into with all other states which adopt the compact in a form substantially as follows:
(L. 1996 S.B. 740 §§ 1, 2) 
*Words "of this compact" do not appear in original rolls.
